budgets.label: api-server-freeze
budgets.description: Freeze FastAPI monolith growth until router extraction lands.

budgets.label: react-app-freeze
budgets.description: Freeze React shell monolith growth until hook and feature extraction lands.

budgets.label: core-package-modules
budgets.description: Keep non-server package modules below the current maintainability ceiling.

budgets.label: web-feature-components
budgets.description: Feature components stay under the largest current panel size during the split.

budgets.label: web-state-modules
budgets.description: Persisted browser-state helpers remain small and focused.

budgets.label: automation-scripts
budgets.description: Operational scripts should not become new god files.

budgets.label: python-tests
budgets.description: Characterization tests remain reviewable while preserving broad coverage.

budgets.label: future-api-routers
budgets.description: Target ceiling for extracted API route families.

budgets.label: future-api-services
budgets.description: Target ceiling for extracted API service modules.

budgets.label: future-web-hooks-js
budgets.description: Target ceiling for extracted React hooks.

budgets.label: future-web-hooks-jsx
budgets.description: Target ceiling for extracted React hooks that stay in JSX.

characterization_commands: python -m pytest -q tests/api/test_api_pdk_manifest.py tests/api/test_api_invdesign.py tests/test_golden_chain_fixture.py tests/test_flagship_invdesign_fixture.py
cd web && npm run build && npm run test:ui -- tests/ui.smoke.spec.js tests/ui.workspace.spec.js tests/ui.demo.spec.js tests/ui.a11y.spec.js
